chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 506 - وَ أَتَى أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَوْماً قَدْ أُصِيبُوا بِمُصِيبَةٍ فَقَالَ «جَبَرَ اَللَّهُ وَهْنَكُمْ وَ أَحْسَنَ عَزَاكُمْ وَ رَحِمَ مُتَوَفَّاكُمْ» ثُمَّ اِنْصَرَفَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.506 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) visited a group of people who had experienced a loss and said:
"May Allah (swt) strengthen you in your weakness, grant you beautiful patience, and have mercy on your deceased."
Then he departed.
